summary: Crypto Sniper Slug-based Classification feature fully verified. All 64 backend tests passed. Slug patterns btc-updown-5m-{ts}, bitcoin-up-or-down, bitcoin-above-{price}, will-bitcoin-hit-{price} all working. Strike parsing with 'k' and 'm' suffixes correct. MarketSnapshot has slug/end_date fields. Gamma API limit=500. max_tte_seconds=28800. Classification correctly identifies 1 BTC $1M market. All frontend pages load correctly.

backend_unit_tests: test_classify_updown_slug - Full classification with market_type=updown, window=5m
test_question_only_btc_above - Backward compat: slug='' falls back to question
test_question_only_eth_below - Backward compat for ETH below
backend_api_tests: GET /api/strategies/sniper/signals returns rejected signal with asset=BTC, strike=1000000
frontend_ui_tests: Sniper Health tab shows Max TTE = 28800s
Sniper Rejected tab shows BTC $1,000,000 signal

critical_code_review_comments: crypto_sniper.py _SLUG_PATTERNS (lines 57-82): 4 slug patterns correctly defined for updown-5m, up-or-down, above-{price}, hit-{price}
crypto_sniper.py classify_market_question: Checks slug first, then falls back to question parsing - good design
sniper_models.py SniperConfig: max_tte_seconds=28800.0 (8 hours) as specified
models.py MarketSnapshot: slug and end_date fields present (lines 72-73)
market_data.py _parse_gamma_market: slug and end_date stored correctly (lines 87-88, 113-114)

success_rate.backend: 100% (64/64 tests passed, 1 skipped for insufficient vol data)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Slug-based classification feature complete. Key changes verified: (1) _SLUG_PATTERNS handles btc-updown-5m-{ts}, bitcoin-up-or-down-{date}, bitcoin-above-{price}, will-bitcoin-hit-{price}. (2) _parse_strike handles k/m suffixes. (3) MarketSnapshot has slug/end_date fields. (4) Gamma API limit=500 (pairs_scanned=500 in arb health). (5) max_tte_seconds=28800 in config. (6) Currently 1 market classified (BTC $1M hit) - rejected for tte=137 days > max 8h. No short-term updown markets active on Polymarket currently.

features_tested.slug_pattern_bitcoin_above_price: PASS - Regex matches and classifies with strike
features_tested.slug_pattern_will_bitcoin_hit: PASS - Regex matches and classifies with strike
features_tested.backward_compat_question_only: PASS - slug='' falls back to question patterns
